/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g --coverage CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_integration_networking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_integration_cognitive.cpp.o CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_integration_e2e.cpp.o CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_distributed_cognition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_distributed_advanced.cpp.o CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_brain_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/__/python/nimcp_module.c.o -o integration_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/src/repos/nimcp/build/src/lib ../lib/libnimcp_core.so.2.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so -lpthread -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
